meta.title: Ed Schweitzer Clip on Complexity and Waynes World
meta.description: Ed Schweitzer of Schweitzer Engineering Laboratories (SEL) went from insightful to technical to funny in our S4x20 onstage interview. This 3-minute clip discusses resetting complexity in a product/system and ends with Wayne's World. #icssecurity #s4xevents
